full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #48 (2026-05-31)

PULSE
Health: 0.5213 (C). 1028 wallets, 287 contributors. 25 memos today vs 91 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
64 reward payments, 202100 PFT distributed to 14 contributors. Top earner: rhwiJx...2TaE (36000 PFT).

AIRDROPS
1 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 3,400 PFT. Highest: r4ahFv...5XyU (3,400 PFT). 7-day leader: r4ahFv...5XyU (20,800 PFT, avg 4,160/day over 5 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (56 memos). Fastest new contributor: rU963x...fyUj (27.0 memos/day in 1 days). 19 new wallet(s) this week. 56 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
769 sybil accounts tracked across 6 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 71.3%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-05-01): 152 transactions from 30 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
